found_files.file_name: Codebook for the app Hagen (Google Sheet)
found_files.evidence_text: The public codebook lists intended fields for the Hagen app, including original N, original effect size, original confidence intervals, replication effect size, and replication confidence intervals. It contains metadata only, not row-level data values.
found_files.why_relevant: The codebook confirms that the missing backing dataset was intended to contain original and replication effect fields, but it is not itself a result table.

nonworking_or_blocked_routes.notes: The Google Sheet that the Shiny app attempted to load appears deleted. Local export attempt returned Google Drive 'Sorry, the file you have requested has been deleted' HTML.
The external agent reported that the main OSF project page has no available files and checked linked services/components without finding downloadable datasets.
The external agent reported no Hagen entries in FReD Explorer.

dn_assessment.notes: Only a codebook was obtained. The numeric backing data sheet was deleted, so there are no row-level original or replication effect/N values to mine.

mirrored_files.note: Local default-sheet CSV export is codebook-only. It includes N Original and Effect size Replication fields but does not contain numeric data rows. The local export did not show N Replication, despite the external report mentioning that field.
Google Drive deleted-file response for the backing data sheet export route.

recommended_next_action: Contact project maintainers or contributors, such as Marc Jekel or other OSF-listed contributors, to request the Hagen Cumulative Science Project I master dataset. If available, ask for original effect size, original N, replication effect size, replication N, confidence intervals, target-study identifiers, and source links. Also try repository history, Wayback snapshots, or personal/project archives for the deleted Google Sheet ID 1VBnEGbanAt5yLXkpMGRGJWZeuw1TLNVudksgXyksHq0.
